title: PASET Regional Scholarship and Innovation Fund (RSIF) Scholar
organization: Partnership for Skills in Applied Sciences, Engineering and Technology
summary: Selected among outstanding African researchers for a highly competitive doctoral fellowship valued at approximately USD 100,000. Funded by the World Bank and supported by the African Union, the programme promotes advanced research, innovation, international collaboration, and scientific leadership across Africa.

title: Academic Excellence Recognition
summary: Recognized for research mentorship and curriculum innovation.

title: Applied Research Impact Award
summary: Awarded for contributions to locally relevant AI and cybersecurity projects.
